article_meta.title: Democracy Dies in DarknessBusinessFuture of WorkEconomyEconomic PolicyMediaPersonal FinanceTechnologyBusiness of Climate

reasoning: The summary maintains neutral language, avoids adopting charged framing, and attributes key assertions. Minor issues include an un-attributed inference about the Helldivers 2 code and omission of Trump/inner-circle claims about radicalization.

custom_reasoning.spin: Uses neutral descriptors (e.g., 'conservative activist,' 'prosecutors allege'); no loaded verbs.
custom_reasoning.unsubstantiated_claims: States the bullet code as from Helldivers 2 without explicit attribution; 'no obvious warning signs' is generalized from interviews.
custom_reasoning.opinion_as_fact: Most evaluative points are attributed; slight generalization on warning signs.
custom_reasoning.sensationalism: No dramatic or alarming language beyond facts.
custom_reasoning.mudslinging: No personal attacks in the model’s voice.
custom_reasoning.mind_reading: Does not ascribe motives beyond quoted or alleged statements.
custom_reasoning.slant: Does not include Trump/inner-circle radicalization claim, giving more space to friends’ accounts and prosecutors.
custom_reasoning.bias_by_omission: Omits a distinct perspective present in the article (Trump/inner circle’s radicalization claim).
custom_reasoning.negativity_bias: Tone matches article’s factual emphasis without added negativity.
custom_reasoning.elite_populist_bias: Balances officials, prosecutors, and acquaintances without privileging one.
custom_reasoning.framing_neutrality: Language is more clinical than the source; no inheritance of any charged framing.
custom_reasoning.perspective_completeness: Leaves out at least one notable perspective (Trump/inner circle), and minor elements (Erika Kirk’s forgiveness).
